recommended_next_step.name: benchmark_preserving_training_adapter_dryrun
recommended_next_step.description: Implement a trainer adapter that can read this dry-run input, compute CE on teacher-divergence rows, compute KL-to-reference on selected public/protected/tail anchors, and run with --no-save first.
